# Choosing Traffic Forwarding Methods

**Source:** https://help.zscaler.com/zia/choosing-traffic-forwarding-methods
**Captured:** 2026-04-23 via Playwright MCP (bundled chromium rendering the JS-served page; `innerText` extraction of `article`).

---

Internet & SaaS (ZIA) Help — Traffic Forwarding — Choosing Traffic Forwarding Methods

Zscaler supports the following traffic forwarding mechanisms. Depending on your environment and requirements, you can choose one or a combination of the following traffic forwarding methods. Zscaler recommends that you use a combination of tunneling, PAC files, Zscaler Client Connector, and Zscaler Cloud Connector, to forward traffic to the Zscaler service. To learn more, see Best Practices for Traffic Forwarding.

- Zscaler Client Connector
- GRE Tunnels
- IPSec Tunnels
- PAC Files
- Proxy Chaining
- Zscaler Cloud Connector
- Zscaler Branch Connector
